# PIKORUA Realty

> PIKORUA Realty is Ahmedabad's private luxury real estate advisory, specialising in curated apartments, penthouses, duplexes, villas, and bungalows for HNI and NRI buyers across the city's premier western corridors.

## Site Overview

- [Full content index](/llms-full.txt)

## Key Pages

- [Properties](/properties): Curated luxury property listings — 4 BHK & 5 BHK apartments, penthouses, villas, duplexes, and residential plots
- [Locations](/locations): Premium residential corridors — Iskon-Ambli, Sindhu Bhavan Road, Thaltej, Shilaj, SG Highway, Vaishno Devi
- [Property Types](/property-types): Luxury apartments, penthouses & duplexes, villas & bungalows, residential plots
- [Insights](/blog): Market reports, NRI advisory guides, and corridor analysis
- [About](/about): About PIKORUA Realty and founder Jitendra
- [Contact](/contact): Private enquiry and advisory request

## Do Not Index

- /studio/
- /api/
- /admin/
- /demo/
